=== STEP 92 ===

PROGRESS:
📁 Directory: bin/rmdir
   Files: 0/3
📄 File: bin/domainname/Makefile.depend
✏️  Edits: 4 files modified

```
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

```

--- RESPONSE ---


The `Makefile.depend` in `bin/domainname` has proper DIRDEPS content. My `bin/rmdir/Makefile.depend` was emptied to just `#` which is likely causing the silent build failure. Let me restore it with proper content:

ACTION: WRITE_FILE bin/rmdir/Makefile.depend
CONTENT:
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif
